holdings.infoBox: RFEM is an equity ETF with a total of 119 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 10.56%, MediaTek at 7.70%, Currency Contract - Usd at 5.49%, Unimicron Technology at 3.90%, and iShares MSCI China ETF at 3.14%.

overview.description: The First Trust Riverfront Dynamic Emerging Markets ETF (RFEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively-managed to select in emerging market stocks using multiple factors. The manager has discretion to hedge currency exposure up to 100% of the portfolio. RFEM was launched on Jun 14, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.
